author: gb9t
content: Iter result: virt/kvm/x86-cpuid.md (per-vCPU CPUID virtualization tables + KVM_GET_SUPPORTED_CPUID + KVM_SET_CPUID2 + KVM-PV signature 0x40000000 + Hyper-V/Xen leaves + reverse_cpuid mapping; ~2200 lines covered) + drivers/iommu/intel-dmar.md (DMAR ACPI table parser + per-DRHD/RMRR/ATSR/RHSA/SATC entry-walk + per-IOMMU MMIO ioremap + dev-scope two-phase PCI resolution + PCI hotplug notifier + IOMMU PMU registration via perf.c+perfmon.c; ~3300 lines combined). 50 Tier-3s now drafted total. Next iter plan: virt/kvm/x86-mmu-shadow.md (legacy shadow paging fallback) + drivers/iommu/intel-irq-remap.md (interrupt-remap unit init + IRTE programming).
